name: Butterfinger Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 large container of Cool Whip, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake the cake in a 9 x 13 pan.
2. While the cake is still hot, pour the butterscotch topping over the cake and poke small holes so that the topping can soak in.
3. Allow the cake to cool completely.
4. Crush the Butterfinger bars. Reserve half of one bar. Mix the rest with the Cool Whip and pecans.
5. Spread this mixture over the cooled cake and top with the reserved Butterfinger pieces.
6. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
